source.name: SBI Card
source.document: Customer Notices - Revision of Terms and Conditions

faqTemplateAnswers.Is this card lifetime free?: No. It has a ₹499 + taxes joining and annual fee, waived on renewal if you spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the preceding year.
faqTemplateAnswers.Is it worth it?: Yes, for online-shopping-focused users — 10X Reward Points (≈5% value) on partner brands like BookMyShow, Apollo 24/7, Domino's, Myntra, and Yatra, plus 5X on all other online spends, make it one of the better sub-₹500 online shopping cards, though it earns reward points rather than direct cashback.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should get this card?: First-time credit card users or online shoppers who want accelerated rewards on e-commerce and select partner brands without a high annual fee.
faqTemplateAnswers.Does it support UPI?: This card is issued on the Visa network; Visa credit cards cannot currently be linked to UPI apps in India (SBI does offer a separate SimplySAVE UPI RuPay variant for UPI linkage).
faqTemplateAnswers.Can I get lounge access with this card?: No, SBI Card SimplyCLICK does not offer complimentary airport lounge access.
faqTemplateAnswers.What income is required to qualify?: SBI generally requires a minimum monthly income of around ₹30,000 for salaried applicants.
faqTemplateAnswers.Who should avoid this card?: Shoppers who spend mostly offline or in categories outside the 10X/5X partner list, since the base offline rate is a modest 1 point per ₹100.
faqTemplateAnswers.What are the best alternatives?: Amazon Pay ICICI Credit Card (better if Amazon is your main platform) or HDFC Millennia (broader 5% cashback across 10 brands including food delivery and cabs).
